title: Jyotiraditya Pradhan
text:
I’m a fourth year economics undergraduate at Azim Premji University, Bengaluru. My broad interests lie across microeconomics, development, and methods of statistical inference.
My current research looks to model labour market transitions using markov chains. I’m also working as a research assistant in a project studying the phenomenon of ID blocking of gig workers.
PS: Love to chat; feel free to reach out!
